Localization.Description: The use of the msds-keycredentiallink attribute to authorize a machine account in a domain without using a password was detected. This is a sign of using KrbRelayUp to locally elevate privileges using Shadow Credentials. An attacker can use this to obtain the credentials of other users and horizontally move to other infrastructure nodes

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A change of {object.property} attribute of directory service object {src.hostname} is detected on host {event_src.host}. It is a sign that KrbRelayUp is used to locally escalate privileges using Shadow Credentials.

Issuance of a TGT with parameters {datafield8} requested by host {subject.account.name} with logon type {logon_type} and CertIssuerName {datafield7} is detected on host {event_src.host}. It is a sign that KrbRelayUp is used to locally escalate privileges using Shadow Credentials.
